title: Abraham / Ibrahim
similarities: Abraham is called by God to leave homeland and trust promise.
He is a central exemplar of faith.
His family line is tied to covenantal destiny.

differences.description: Traditions emphasize different covenantal lineages in later communal identity.
Islamic tradition commonly associates the near-sacrifice with Ishmael, while Genesis names Isaac.

commentary_notes: Abraham is a major bridge node for interfaith comparative study.
The node can expand to include shared sites and pilgrimage memory.
